data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve category-rated areas for a location
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves category-rated areas for a specified location, providing scores and ratings across different categories. This operation accepts location parameters and returns detailed category ratings that help assess the quality and characteristics of areas within that location. Use this to understand how different categories (such as safety, dining, entertainment, etc.) are rated in a specific geographic area.
